name: Dragonhunter Crystal
description: This weapon is carved from a dragon's thigh bone. The image of a dragon's skeleton is inlaid in jet. A creature of the dragon type that is hit by a projectile fired from this weapon takes 1 point of Strength damage in addition to the normal damage from the weapon. In addition, the weapon's critical multiplier increases by 1 if the target is a dragon. Other effects related to threatening or confirming critical hits don't function when placed on a weapon that has this property.
